caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bowtie, white suspenders, glasses, and headphones. He wears a large, stylized grey wig that stands tall on his head. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, and he speaks while gesturing with his hands. The background consists of a white wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a black vest. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the man, featuring the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" accompanied by a microphone icon. As the scene progresses, the man continues to talk, shifting his head slightly and moving his arms to emphasize his points. He remains the sole person visible throughout the sequence, centered within the frame against the curated studio backdrop.
